title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Flipkart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
